metadata.description: 重组 terminal/packages/tui 目录结构，收集疑似未启用功能，最终移除 TUI-local import alias 和兼容残留。

task.name: Create feature and unused-code inventory
task.description: Collect potentially unused or inactive code paths in the TUI package, including LSP, support utilities, compatibility exports, and dead entry points.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Track-local inventory exists and lists each candidate with references and keep/remove recommendation.
LSP-related code is explicitly evaluated.

task.name: Capture structural baseline checks
task.description: Record current file counts, alias usages, package entry exports, and existing test commands before moving files.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Baseline alias and deep-path scan is recorded.
Relevant TUI tests or smoke checks are identified.

task.name: Move startup entry files into entry area
task.description: Move index, cli bridge, thread command, preload, and TuiA1 main startup code into the new entry structure while preserving exports and package scripts.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Existing CLI/dev startup behavior remains available.
Package exports and scripts point to the new entry locations.

task.name: Separate runtime adapter from UI code
task.description: Reorganize runtime facade files under runtime subareas and ensure runtime code does not import UI components.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Runtime files are grouped by client/catalog/bridge/mock responsibility.
No runtime-to-UI dependency is introduced.

task.name: Repair direct package source imports
task.description: Replace direct imports from sibling package source paths with package exports or update exports where necessary.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: No TUI source imports `../../organ-support/src` directly.

phase.name: UI Provider and TuiA1 Feature Reorganization

task.name: Move reusable UI primitives and dialogs
task.description: Consolidate reusable dialog, toast, selection, primitive, and prompt components under the reusable UI area.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Reusable UI code does not import TuiA1 app implementation.
Existing dialog behavior remains covered by tests or smoke checks.

task.name: Move providers to generic or app-owned areas
task.description: Separate generic providers from TuiA1 state-dependent providers and eliminate generic-to-app reverse dependencies.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Top-level providers do not import `app/tui_a1` internals.
TuiA1-specific sync/local/route providers live under app ownership.

task.name: Replace vague materials directories
task.description: Move `materials` directories into explicit feature, provider, state, route, or logic directories.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: No source path under TUI uses a `materials` directory for active code.

phase.name: TuiA1 Root Split and Behavior Preservation

task.name: Split TuiA1 root orchestration file
task.description: Extract app root, view/layout, runtime effects, and dialog wiring from the current large TuiA1 root file.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: TuiA1 root file is focused on composition rather than mixed feature logic.
Streaming, composer, session list, message list, and system dialogs continue to work.

task.name: Add or adjust targeted regression tests
task.description: Add or update tests that protect startup, provider wiring, dialog wiring, and stream/message rendering paths affected by file moves.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Tests fail if key wiring paths are broken.
TUI package test command passes.

phase.name: Alias Compatibility and Unused Feature Cleanup

task.name: Remove TUI-local import aliases
task.description: Replace TUI-local alias imports with final non-alias imports and update TypeScript path configuration accordingly.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: No `@tui/` imports remain in `terminal/packages/tui/src`.
No `@/` imports remain in `terminal/packages/tui/src`.
TUI-local alias config is removed or no longer applicable to source imports.

task.name: Remove migration-only compatibility code
task.description: Remove temporary re-export files, old path barrels, empty directories, and compatibility code created only for the migration.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: No migration-only compatibility shims remain.
Old directory names do not remain as empty shells.

task.name: Apply unused-feature decisions
task.description: Keep, relocate, or delete inventory candidates based on recorded evidence and decisions.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Each inventory item has a final decision and outcome.
Removed items have validation evidence that behavior was not regressed.

task.name: Run final structural scans and tests
task.description: Run final tests, import alias scans, direct package source import scans, and file tree review.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: TUI tests pass.
Alias scan passes with zero TUI-local alias imports.
Direct sibling package source import scan passes.
Feature inventory is closed with decisions.
